global_description: Large, elongated vehicle with a bright red body, equipped with ladders, hoses, and flashing emergency lights. The exterior is metallic with a glossy finish, featuring multiple compartments for equipment storage. It has a cab for firefighters and a rear section for water tanks.

part_details.lights: Flashing red and white emergency lights on top
part_details.body: Elongated, bright red with a glossy metallic finish
part_details.ladders: Long, extendable ladders mounted on top

spatial_relations: Ladders mounted on top of the body
Lights positioned on top of the cab
